cards.title: Predictive Human Preference: From Model Ranking to Model Routing
cards.desc: <p>A challenge of building AI applications is choosing which model to use. What if we don’t have to? What if we can predict the best model for any prompt? Predictive human preference aims to predict which model users might prefer for a specific query.</p> <p>Human preference has em
cards.author: Chip Huyen

cards.title: Generation configurations: temperature, top-k, top-p, and test time compute
cards.desc: <p>ML models are probabilistic. Imagine that you want to know what’s the best cuisine in the world. cards.title: Multimodality and Large Multimodal Models (LMMs)
cards.desc: <p>For a long time, each ML model operated in one data mode – text (translation, language modeling), image (object detection, image classification), or audio (speech recognition).</p> <p>However, natural intelligence is not limited to just a single modality. Humans can read, talk,
cards.author: Chip Huyen
